name: NVIDIA
about: NVIDIA's hiring process is known for being extremely technical, focusing heavily on CUDA, Low-Level C/C++, System Programming, and Deep Learning GPU acceleration.

roles.description: Develop and optimize system software, driver stacks, and compiler pipelines for NVIDIA GPUs.

rounds.name: Resume Screening
rounds.instructions: Initial automated resume screening evaluating skills match against NVIDIA's low-level stack expectations.

rounds.name: Online Assessment
rounds.instructions: Solve algorithmic and system optimization challenges. Code execution tests with performance constraints.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 1 (System & DSA)
rounds.instructions: Deep dive into low-level memory layout, pointer manipulation, and complex algorithm optimizations.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 2 (System Design / CUDA)
rounds.instructions: Discussion on multi-threading, CPU caching, GPU core layouts, and design tradeoffs.

rounds.name: Behavioral / Values Round
rounds.instructions: Behavioral assessment using the STAR format, mapping against NVIDIA values of speed, excellence, and collaboration.

roles.description: Design and build AI architectures, deep learning model pipelines, and optimized neural networks.

rounds.name: Resume Screening
rounds.instructions: Automated evaluation of project portfolios and technical matching on neural net frameworks.

rounds.name: Online Assessment
rounds.instructions: Solve algorithmic challenges with dynamic optimization constraints.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 1 (ML Theory & DSA)
rounds.instructions: In-depth ML fundamentals, mathematical proof discussions, and coding of layers from scratch.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 2 (System Design & Scaling)
rounds.instructions: Scale models on cluster systems and discuss TensorRT inference optimizations.

rounds.name: Behavioral / Values Round
rounds.instructions: NVIDIA values check focusing on innovation and project execution under high pressure.

roles.description: Optimize algorithms for GPU architectures using CUDA and parallel programming paradigms.

rounds.name: Resume Screening
rounds.instructions: Resume check focusing on CUDA programming and GPU architecture concepts.

rounds.name: Online Assessment
rounds.instructions: Solve algorithmic problems requiring parallel execution paradigms or memory locality.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 1 (GPU Memory & C++)
rounds.instructions: Detailed questions on GPU memory hierarchies and minimizing warp divergence.

rounds.name: Technical Interview 2 (Parallel Algorithms)
rounds.instructions: Design efficient GPU parallel algorithms like prefix sum (scan) or reduction from scratch.

rounds.name: Behavioral / Values Round
rounds.instructions: NVIDIA speed and high performance values discussion.
